headline: Dividend Hike And Digital Push Might Change The Case For Investing In Willis Towers Watson (WTW)
summary: In late February 2026, Willis Towers Watson increased its regular quarterly dividend to US$0.96 per share and launched a Global Digital Infrastructure Group to offer end-to-end risk solutions for data center stakeholders worldwide. Together with a new Singapore country leader and a digital insurance partnership with Belfry Software, these moves highlight WTW’s push into specialized, complex risk areas and integrated, tech-enabled services. We’ll now examine how the dividend increase,...

headline: 4 Stocks to Watch From the Prospering Insurance Brokerage Industry
summary: Zacks Insurance Brokerage players like HVRRY, EHTH, WTW and AON are likely to benefit from increased demand for insurance products, strategic acquisitions and the adoption of technology.
